message:
🐛 fix: GA4 mobile monitor sample-size floor (#8136) (#8138)

Raise MIN_DAILY_SESSIONS from 10 to 200 and reset the consecutive-low
streak when a day is skipped.

At current traffic volume (50-106 sessions/day), a 5% mobile threshold
is dominated by sample-size noise: 1-2 users shifts the percentage by
1-2 points. The monitor has been auto-opening and auto-closing the same
issue on 5 consecutive days (#5705, #5998, #6335, #7913, #8136) despite
no code change to mobile-sensitive files.

With the new 200-session floor, low-volume days are skipped entirely
rather than treated as signal, and the streak counter resets on skip so
two low-volume-but-flagged days can't chain across a skipped day. Once
daily traffic grows past 200 sessions, the monitor resumes its original
job of catching a real regression like the March 20 Sidebar.tsx render
loop.

Fixes #8136

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
